ops.title: daemonkit
ops.description:
Extract daemonkit (github.com/yasyf/daemonkit): one home for the fleet's Go daemon lifecycle (proc/service/version/paths/appgroup/bundle/wire/trust/daemon/drain/supervise), the Swift signed-app/widget pattern (SPM DaemonKit + templates), group signing, and the shared release lane (homebrew-tap release-app.yml + repo-bootstrap daemonkit layer + apple-certs skill) — then migrate every relevant repo onto it: fusekit (first, ships golden-bunny drain), cc-interact, cc-orchestrate, cc-pool, cc-notes, captain-hook (rebuilt per curious-karp with substrate swapped), synckit/cookiesync/reposync (synckitd retired), authkit consumers, homebrew-tap, repo-bootstrap.

Canonical plan: /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-08/plans/we-want-to-extracct-cozy-ocean.md (hardened 2026-07-18 by a 16-agent evidence pass; all must-fix findings folded in as normative contracts). Release ladder: v0.1 core port → v0.2 drain (tagged only after fusekit Track F integration green) → v0.3 Swift pkg → v1.0.0 when cc-pool lands. Hard cut everywhere: no re-exports, no migration code, consumers flip imports in their own pinned commits validated under go.work.
